text: Male elite marathoners wearing advanced carbon-plate racing shoes (Nike Vaporfly/Alphafly) ran 2.0% or 2.8 minutes faster than those wearing other shoes in World Marathon Majors.
Female elite marathoners wearing advanced carbon-plate racing shoes ran 2.6% or 4.3 minutes faster than those wearing other shoes in World Marathon Majors.
The performance-enhancing effect of advanced racing shoes is greater in female elite marathoners than in males.
In within-runner comparisons, male elite marathoners improved by 0.8% or 1.2 minutes when switching to advanced carbon-plate racing shoes from their previous shoe.
In within-runner comparisons, female elite marathoners improved by 1.6% or 3.7 minutes when switching to advanced carbon-plate racing shoes from their previous shoe.
Advanced racing shoe technology (carbon plate, foam stack) reduces the energetic cost of running, contributing to faster marathon finishing times at the elite level.
